description_long: This object is a compact, modern coffee machine with a rectangular base and a prominent brewing head. The machine features a cup platform with a drip tray, a visible spout for dispensing coffee, and a raised section likely housing the water reservoir and internal mechanisms. The exterior is predominantly dark, with a sleek, hard surface finish, and the design is minimalistic with clean lines. The brewing area is clearly defined, and there are a few buttons or controls on the top or front panel, though details are subtle. The machine appears to be made primarily of plastic and metal, with some transparent or semi-transparent elements possibly for water level indication. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, giving it a utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, modern coffee machine with a dark, sleek exterior, a defined brewing area, and minimalistic controls. The design is utilitarian and suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the brewing head, cup platform, and drip tray, with the main body and control area visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the raised section at the back, with minimal detail on the brewing area.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back and side of the machine, with the cup platform and spout partially visible.
description_view_3: Direct side view focusing on the machine's depth and the alignment of the main components, with the brewing area less visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A few small buttons are located on the top or front panel, arranged in a linear or clustered fashion, with no visible labeling or icons.
